vision_report.compositional_truth_check: The registry is largely invalidated by the current visual evidence. P3 (Pothos/Rabbit) and P2/P4 (Mexican Mint/Silver Guest) are no longer visible in the frame. The desk surface shows significant debris and loss of biological material.

inventory_reconciliation.P3: Systemic Loss (Rabbit anchor missing, Pothos missing)

plant_audit.P1: Soil appears dark and undisturbed. No visible growth.
plant_audit.P2_P4_Zone: Completely vacant. No plant matter detected.
plant_audit.P3_Zone: The white rabbit anchor has been removed. The Pothos specimen is absent.

biome_observations.soil_texture: Appears moist/dark in P1; other pots are obscured or empty.
biome_observations.debris: Presence of a small, multi-legged electronic component (IC chip) on the desk surface, introduced between T-2 and T-1.
biome_observations.anomalies: Total disappearance of all biological specimens from the observed area.

temporal_deltas.earliest_to_T-3: Initial state shows P3 (Rabbit/Pothos) and P1 (Yellow pot).
temporal_deltas.T-3_to_T-2: Introduction of an electronic component (IC chip) to the right of the pots.
temporal_deltas.T-2_to_current: Rapid systemic loss. All plants and the rabbit anchor have been removed from the desk surface.

vision_report.visual_health_inference: The biome has suffered a total collapse. There are no living specimens remaining in the observed field of view. The environment has transitioned from a botanical workspace to an empty surface with residual debris.
anomalies: Introduction of an electronic integrated circuit (IC) chip.
Removal of the white rabbit scale anchor.
Complete removal of all plant specimens.
vision_report.narrative_description: The audit reveals a catastrophic loss of the botanical collection. Starting from the earliest image, the desk contained a Pothos in a pot with a rabbit figurine and a yellow pot (P1). Over the course of the sequence, the plants were systematically removed. By the final image, the desk is entirely devoid of plant life, leaving only the yellow pot and a piece of electronic hardware. The environment is no longer a functioning biome.
